property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Main headline at the top of the card

property.name: headerBadgeText
property.label: Header Badge
property.description: Small badge under the title (leave blank to hide)

property.name: externalLoanLabel
property.label: External / Current Loan Label
property.description: Label for the current loan column (e.g. Current External Loan)

property.name: externalApr
property.label: External APR
property.description: APR for the current loan (e.g. 7.5% APR)

property.name: externalMonthly
property.label: External Monthly Payment
property.description: Monthly payment line (e.g. Monthly: $350)

property.name: institutionRateLabel
property.label: Institution Rate Label
property.description: Label for your rate (include brand name, e.g. Cumulus Pre-Approved Rate)

property.name: institutionApr
property.label: Institution APR
property.description: APR for your offer (e.g. 4.9% APR)

property.name: institutionMonthly
property.label: Institution Monthly Payment
property.description: Monthly payment line (e.g. Monthly: $266)

property.name: rateDropSectionLabel
property.label: Rate Drop Section Title
property.description: Label above the rate-drop bar

property.name: rateDropBarFillPercent
property.label: Rate Drop Bar Fill (%)
property.description: 0–100: how much of the bar is filled (visual emphasis)

property.name: rateDropCaption
property.label: Rate Drop Caption
property.description: Text under the bar (e.g. 7.5% → 4.9% (2.6 pts))

property.name: savingsSectionLabel
property.label: Savings Section Title
property.description: Label above the monthly savings amount

property.name: savingsAmount
property.label: Monthly Savings Amount
property.description: Primary savings metric (e.g. $84/month)

property.name: savingsFormula
property.label: Savings Explanation
property.description: Small text explaining the calculation

property.name: savingsLabelColor
property.label: Savings Title Color
property.description: Hex color for the savings section title

property.name: savingsCardBgColor
property.label: Savings Card Background
property.description: Background color for the savings block (hex)

property.name: savingsAccentBorderColor
property.label: Savings Card Accent Stripe
property.description: Left border color on the savings card (hex)

property.name: disclaimerNote
property.label: Disclaimer
property.description: Optional fine print above the CTA (leave blank to hide)

property.name: ctaLabel
property.label: CTA Button Label
property.description: Leave blank to hide the button

property.name: ctaButtonColor
property.label: CTA Button Color
property.description: Background/border color for the primary button only (hex). Card uses fixed Cumulus blue #0176d3.
